docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LOZOVSKY, OLGA AS TO DEFENDANT LAGUIO, OMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAGUIO, OMAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOZOVSKY, OLGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAGUIO, OMAR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
